overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian industrial district at dusk during light rain. The scene features wet reflective streets, neon digital billboards, massive industrial structures including a gantry crane, and futuristic megabuildings with dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wet road with digital billboards

events.description: dark SUV passes by on the road from right to left
approaching sidewalk and transitioning from road to pavement edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right side of a wet asphalt road with neon billboards visible on the left

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving past on the wet road from right to left

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens showing character portraits and text
tall modern street lamps with bright white LED light
tall futuristic buildings silhouetted against the dusk sky
rain-slicked dark asphalt surface with reflective puddles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide wet road at dusk with large digital billboards illuminating the left side. The player walks forward along the road as a dark SUV passes by. Street lights and distant futuristic skyscrapers are visible against the darkening sky, with the wet pavement reflecting the ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial entrance with large gantry crane

events.description: moving from paved road onto dirt ground approaching industrial yard entrance
passing under massive orange gantry crane structure with overhead lights

agents.ego_description: walking into an industrial area, navigating around parked vehicles and equipment under the gantry crane

entered.detail: massive orange industrial portal crane with overhead lights spanning the yard entrance
tropical palm vegetation near the industrial structure
stacked metal cargo containers in various colors
small corrugated metal building with warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the open road into an industrial yard, moving onto dirt ground. A massive orange gantry crane dominates the entrance, with shipping containers and industrial sheds visible. Palm trees and parked vehicles line the path as the player walks under the illuminated crane structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard with shipping containers and futuristic megabuilding

events.description: turning to reveal massive futuristic megabuilding with red warning lights dramatically lit against dusk sky

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial yard, turning left to view the massive futuristic building with red lights

entered.detail: massive dark industrial complex with glowing red warning lights and illuminated windows
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
elevated concrete highway structure with vehicles passing overhead

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the industrial yard, the player turns to reveal a massive futuristic megabuilding with striking red warning lights against the dark sky. Shipping containers and graffiti-covered walls line the path while a highway overpass becomes visible on the left. The gantry crane recedes to the left as the player advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk alongside graffiti wall under highway overpass

events.description: moving into narrow corridor between graffiti wall and highway overpass with reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow concrete path next to graffiti-covered wall with highway overpass overhead

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow corridor walking alongside a graffiti-covered wall with the highway overpass now directly overhead on the left. The futuristic megabuilding and industrial yard recede into the background as the path becomes more enclosed. The scene is lit by street lights and the ambient glow from the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit city thoroughfare into the enclosed depths of a gritty industrial district. It begins on a wet road at dusk, moving past glowing digital billboards and a passing SUV while the pavement reflects the dim light of distant skyscrapers. As the camera leaves the asphalt, the scene shifts into an industrial yard of dirt and shipping containers, passing beneath the massive frame of an illuminated orange gantry crane. The view then expands to reveal a towering futuristic megabuilding marked by red warning lights before the camera turns toward a highway overpass and graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the open yard recedes as the path narrows into a confined corridor beneath the overpass, lit by the ambient glow of street lights.
